headline: A Look At Cummins (CMI) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Stock performance snapshot Cummins (CMI) has drawn fresh attention after a strong recent run, with the stock up 2.77% over the past day, 7.89% over the past week and 18.42% over the past month. Over the past 3 months, Cummins shows a 14.89% return and a year to date gain of 25.84%, while the 1 year total return stands at 127.63%, and the 3 year and 5 year total returns are 204.66% and 188.22% respectively.
